problem id: 0c1a09ce
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  10011101 -> 10000000
  00100000 -> 00000000
  00000100 -> 00000000
  00111001 -> 00000000
  11011100 -> 10000000
  11111101 -> 10000000
  01010101 -> 00000000
  01010000 -> 00000000
  01000011 -> 00100000

query: 00101111
predicted answer: 11100000
